properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Can you take me by the hand Can you use me as I am Break me into who you want me to be When the time is finally right You will open up my eyes Show me everything you want me to see This life is not my own

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To God alone be the glory To God alone be the praise Everything I say and do Let it be all for you The glory is yours alone Yours alone

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Take the offering I bring You want more than what I sing Can I give you every part of me? Turn these pennies into gold Take this life I call my own Until I'm running after your heart I'm needing to let go

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: To God alone be the glory To God alone be the praise Everything I say and do Let it be all for you The glory is yours alone

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We will rise and we will fall But you remain after all You're glorious and beautiful You're beautiful
